// metal-cagra: cuVS-compatible CAGRA implementation for Apple Silicon Metal GPU
// Generated by Ouroboros execution session orch_12b70c58ac41

// === include/cuvs/neighbors/cagra.hpp ===
// cuVS CAGRA header shim with index_params, search_params, index<T> template,
// build() and search() function signatures matching FAISS v1.8.0 cuVS integration.
// index_params includes: intermediate_graph_degree, graph_degree, metric (L2Expanded).
// search_params includes: itopk_size, max_iterations, algo, search_width, hashmap settings.
// index<DataT,IndexT> stores dataset copy, rows, cols.

// === include/raft/core/resources.hpp ===
// RAFT resources header-only shim. resources class with sync_stream().
// device_matrix_view<ElementType,IndexType> with data(), extent(), size().
// make_device_matrix_view() factory. No CUDA/RAFT runtime dependency.

// === src/cagra.cpp ===
// build<float,int64_t>: validates params+dataset, copies dataset into index.
// search<float,uint32_t,int64_t>: CPU brute-force L2 search (MVP, not Metal GPU yet).
// Shape validation, dimension checks, k-NN computation via std::partial_sort.

// === include/metal_cagra/hardware.hpp + src/hardware.cpp ===
// Apple Silicon detection via sysctl/system-profiler.
// Reports chip model, GPU core count, unified memory size.
// macOS version check (requires >= 14 Sonoma).

// === include/metal_cagra/sift_loader.hpp + src/sift_loader.cpp ===
// SIFT-1M fvecs/ivecs binary format loader.
// Validates 128-dimensional float32 L2 vectors.

// === include/metal_cagra/baselines/cpu_hnsw.hpp ===
// CPU HNSW baseline with M=16, efConstruction=200, efSearch=128, single-threaded.

// === metal_cagra/benchmark.py ===
// Benchmark harness: 5 warmup + 10 measured iterations, batch_size=100.
// QPS, p50/p99 latency computation, hardware metadata reporting.

// === tests/ ===
// tests/faiss_v1_8_cuvs_header_probe.cpp: FAISS v1.8.0 header compile test
// tests/faiss_v1_8_cuvs_link_probe.cpp: FAISS v1.8.0 link test
// tests/faiss_v1_8_cagra_runtime_smoke.cpp: FAISS runtime smoke test
// tests/test_cpu_hnsw_baseline.cpp: CPU HNSW M/ef parameters test
// tests/test_hardware_detection.cpp: Apple Silicon detection test
// tests/test_sift_loader.cpp: SIFT-1M loader test
// tests/test_benchmark_batching.py: benchmark iteration/warmup test
